channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: abhigyanpatwari / GitNexus
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #4
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
Language: TypeScript 667 stars today

item.title: trycua / cua
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #7
Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
Language: HTML 204 stars today

item.title: gastownhall / beads
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #8
Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent
Language: Go 133 stars today

item.title: curl / curl
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #9
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features
Language: C 9 stars today

item.title: PostHog / posthog
item.description:
📉 Rank: #4 → #5 (↓1) | ⭐ Stars: 33,479 → 33,664 (+185)
🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
Language: Python 338 stars today
